name: excel-ai-agent
description: AI Agent Add-in for Excel - Control Excel via natural language

scripts.render-videos: npx remotion render videos/src/index.ts LogoAnimation public/videos/logo-anim.mp4 --scale=1 && npx remotion render videos/src/index.ts HeroBackground public/videos/hero-bg.mp4 --scale=1 && npx remotion render videos/src/index.ts TerminalDemo public/videos/terminal-demo.mp4 --scale=1 && npx remotion render videos/src/index.ts UseCaseSlides public/videos/use-case-slides.mp4 --scale=1
scripts.test: node test/unit/test_preflight.js && node test/unit/test_schema_drift.js && node test/unit/test_action_preview.js && node test/unit/test_workbook_graph.js && node test/unit/test_runtime_safety.js && node test/unit/test_dcf_backend.js && node test/unit/test_llm_trace.js && node test/unit/test_runtime_outcomes.js && node test/unit/test_production_manifest.js && node test/unit/test_execute_office_js_rpc.js && node test/unit/test_finance_bundle.js && node test/unit/test_tool_result_size_cap.js && node test/unit/test_parallel_calls.js && node test/unit/test_client_read_cache.js && node test/unit/test_bulk_setup.js && node test/unit/test_bulk_write_format.js && node test/unit/test_agent_step.js && node test/unit/test_triage.js && node test/unit/test_architect.js && node test/unit/test_architect_stepwise.js && node test/unit/test_stepwise_turn.js
scripts.validate:manifest:prod: npm run manifest:prod && npx office-addin-manifest validate -p dist/manifest.xml
